name: AI-Based Shipment & Payment Issue Explanation Automation

parameters.query:
SELECT
    sd.SH_ID,
    sd.C_ID,
    sd.SH_CONTENT,
    sd.SH_DOMAIN,
    sd.SER_TYPE,
    sd.SH_WEIGHT,
    sd.SH_CHARGES,
    sd.SR_ADDR,
    sd.DS_ADDR,

    st.Current_Status,
    st.Sent_date,
    st.Delivery_date,

    pd.Payment_ID,
    pd.AMOUNT,
    pd.Payment_Status,
    pd.Payment_Mode,
    pd.Payment_Date,

    ed.E_ID,
    ed.E_NAME,
    ed.E_DESIGNATION,
    ed.E_BRANCH,

    c.C_NAME,
    c.C_EMAIL_ID,
    c.C_TYPE,
    c.C_ADDR,
    c.C_CONT_NO,

    m.M_ID,
    m.Start_date,
    m.End_date

FROM Shipment_Details sd

LEFT JOIN Status st
ON sd.SH_ID = st.SH_ID

LEFT JOIN Payment_Details pd
ON sd.SH_ID = pd.SH_ID

LEFT JOIN Customer c
ON sd.C_ID = c.C_ID

LEFT JOIN Membership m
ON c.M_ID = m.M_ID

LEFT JOIN employee_manages_shipment ems
ON sd.SH_ID = ems.Shipment_Sh_ID

LEFT JOIN Employee_Details ed
ON ems.Employee_E_ID = ed.E_ID

WHERE sd.SH_ID = $1;
